title: ☠️ Entropy Sigils
name: Entropy Sigils
what_it_is: Visual representations of decay, disorder, and energy dispersal encoded into symbolic language—glyphs that *lose meaning* as they animate.
how_to_use: her back is marked in entropy sigils—glyphs that crumble into noise the longer you look
the scroll bleeds entropy—symbols that dissolve as they are read
animation_behavior: Sigils fade and distort, meaning breaks down over time, pieces flake off like ash ---
